reviews.comment:
Lo único que no me gustó qué el café con leche estaba frío y te dicenqueahorate lo llevoa la mesa perote llamán para que lo retires del mostrador , pero después todo bien

The only thing I didn't like was that the coffee with milk was cold and they tell you they'll bring it to the table but then they call you to take it from the counter, but after that everything was fine

reviews.comment:
Cuando no hay  super y hay espera tienen que avisar los playeros y no despues de llegar al surtidor para hacerlo.y esto no sucedio una vez sino varias

(Translated by Google)
When there's no supermarket and there's a wait, the gas station attendants have to warn customers, not after they've already reached the pump. And this didn't happen just once, but several times.
